title: quercus ningqiangensis
intro: Quercus ningqiangensis, also known as the Ningqiang oak, is a species of oak tree native to China. It is valued for its leaves, which are used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The leaves of Quercus ningqiangensis are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to their medicinal properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the leaves are often prepared as a decoction or tea to harness their medicinal properties, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effectiveness.
